summary: The story follows a young man, Saylor, who is on a mission to defeat the ruler of a war-torn land. He encounters various obstacles and enemies, including those using a degraded version of the Dragon Language. Along the way, he meets a former vassal who is now a ruler in his own right and is determined to beat him. The two engage in a intense battle, with Saylor questioning the other's identity and motives.
key_moments: Saylor encounters enemies using the Dragon Language
He meets a former vassal who is now a ruler and engages in a battle
Saylor questions the other's identity and motives
